williamhill_player_shot_lines_shift_rule: Player Shots and Player Shots On Target thresholds shifted +1: 1+->2+, 2+->3+, 3+->4+, etc.
williamhill_embedded_player_shots_rule: Parsed embedded WH rows: At Least N = N+, Over N = N+1 for player shots/SOT
